iteration_1.skill_version: original (verbose with Python code, drug lists, implementation algorithm)

iteration_2.note: note-extraction timed out (23min) due to API rate limit contention from concurrent benchmark

theoretical_maximum.explanation: Four test criteria have testPattern values that don't match any bun-test JUnit XML testcase name attributes. The patterns match describe block names (stored in classname attribute) but matchTests() only searches the name attribute. These criteria always score 0 regardless of model output correctness: output-exists (both tasks, 10pts each), admission-count (15pts), discharge-count (15pts). Total unreachable: 50 points.

changes_made: Removed verbose Python implementation code (regex patterns, algorithm pseudocode)
Removed 20-item common drug list (unnecessary for task completion)
Added explicit JSON output format examples for both tasks
Emphasized exact key names expected by tests (admission_meds, discharge_meds, changes, etc.)
Added CRITICAL labels on negation detection and count requirements
Clarified switch classification rules (switched items should not appear in discontinued/new_meds)
Structured as two clear task sections rather than a monolithic reference
